title: NoiseReducer
description: Tired of harsh Minecraft sounds breaking your focus? NoiseReducer removes the chaos and delivers a smoother, quieter experience by reducing most in-game noise by up to 95%.
body:
## NoiseReducer
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uFJgX4v2/images/f9501e5c947446888841ba33d87f6289a8ae6d6c.png)
------
Tired of harsh Minecraft sounds breaking your focus? **NoiseReducer** removes the chaos and delivers a smoother, quieter experience by reducing most in-game noise by **up to 95%**.

### Features
- **Removed Cave Sounds** for a calm underground experience  
- **Quieter Environment:** rain, thunder, fire, and water drastically reduced  
- **Softened Mechanics:** pistons, dispensers, droppers, and minecarts made gentle  
- **Balanced Explosions:** explosions are now low-impact without losing realism  
- **Tuned Nether Ambience:** portals and ambient hum are nearly silent  
- **Reduced Sculk Activity:** shriekers and sensors are quieted for comfort  
- **Smoothed Consumables:** eating and drinking sounds trimmed for consistency  

Every sound was manually reduced to keep immersion while eliminating noise fatigue.
------
### Ideal For
- Builders and survival players  
- Content creators and streamers  
- Players seeking a peaceful and distraction-free world  
------
**Version:** 1.20+  
**Reduction Level:** ~95%  
**Type:** Audio Optimization Pack
